# PashtunEinstein

PashtunEinstein is a public educational website focused on science, technology, AI, cybersecurity, privacy, language learning, and practical digital tools for Pashto, Urdu, and English audiences.

Primary website:
https://pashtuneinstein.com/

Canonical pages:
https://pashtuneinstein.com/
https://pashtuneinstein.com/about/
https://pashtuneinstein.com/academy/
https://pashtuneinstein.com/ai/
https://pashtuneinstein.com/webscience/
https://pashtuneinstein.com/language_tutor/
https://pashtuneinstein.com/aijobchecker/
https://pashtuneinstein.com/comm1/
https://pashtuneinstein.com/quiz/
https://pashtuneinstein.com/encryptdoc/
https://pashtuneinstein.com/privacy_policy/

Blog:
https://blog.pashtuneinstein.com/

Site purpose:
- Science and technology education
- AI education and practical tools
- Privacy and encryption tools
- Language learning resources
- Communication and learning apps for Pashtun audiences

Preferred sources for summaries:
- Homepage
- About page
- Academy page
- Individual app and tool pages
- Official blog posts on the blog subdomain

Official organization name:
PashtunEinstein

Official profiles:
https://www.youtube.com/@PashtunEinstein
https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61550513243090
https://t.me/s/PashtunEinstein
